body: hit a 225 clean PR at Buckhead this morning. coach had to come verify it lol. best training block I've had all year
STOP. 225?? ok that's insane babe 🎉 Ethan is going to lose his mind when you tell him
already texted him. he wants to come to the 5:15 on Saturday. think he's ready or should I scale him back a little?
he's 14 and thinks he's invincible so… definitely scale him back 😂 but yes let him come, he'll love it
Hit a PR on the clean this morning at Buckhead — 225lbs. Coach wanted to break down my catch position after class. You coming Thursday or are you still making excuses? 😄
Bro 225?? That's not fair you're almost 50. Yeah I'll come. Do I need to bring anything or just show up and suffer?
Just show up at 5:10. I'll bring you a smoothie — whey, banana, spinach, almond butter, creatine. Don't skip the creatine.
Last time I trusted you on a 'quick workout' I couldn't sit down for 3 days. But fine. 5:10. Don't be late or I'm telling mom.
Dad why does your protein smoothie have SPINACH in it 😭 I saw you make it this morning and almost gagged
It's invisible once blended. Zero taste. 30g protein and you don't even know it's there. That's called efficiency, Lily.
You sound like you're prescribing it to a patient lol. Also Ethan said you PR'd your clean and jerk at Buckhead this week??
205 pounds. Five-fifteen class, Tuesday. Coach almost fell off the platform. Don't tell your brother — he'll never let me hear the end of it 😄
Brian, Karen mentioned Ethan's got a lacrosse game Saturday morning. Y'all need me to bring anything? I can grab snacks or whatever the kids want after.
Skip the snacks. Just come watch — 9am at Northside Park. He's been dialing in his shot all week, should be a good one.
Your mama's already got her lawn chair ready 😄 Should we show up before warmups or is 9 fine?
8:45. Park on the Winters Chapel side. I'll be the one hollering too loud from the sideline.
Mom — hit a 225 clean & jerk PR at Buckhead this morning. 5:15am class came through. Still pumped. Clinic's been slammed today but that energy carried.
Brian!! Are you being careful?? You treat knees all day, last thing you need is to be your own patient 😂 so proud though
Karen said the exact same thing. I'm fine — warmup, tape, mobility. Plus it'd be embarrassing to PT myself in my own clinic.
Ha! Smart man. Give Karen and the kids my love. Come see us soon, Atlanta's not that far from home you know 💛
PR'd my 1RM deadlift at 5:15 this morning. 425lbs at CrossFit Buckhead. Took 2 years of work to get there but today was finally the day.
omg stop. isn't that literally what you tell your patients NOT to do lol
my job is to fix people who do it wrong. I did it right 😂 Karen's already rolling her eyes tho.
karen is the smartest person in any room. give her and the kids a hug from me!!
Saw you crushed the 5:15 at Buckhead this morning — they finally program a heavy clean day? Been thinking about dropping into that class from Inman Park.
Yeah. Hit 225. Two training blocks chasing that number. Worth every 4:45 AM alarm, no question.
225 clean at 5am is genuinely unhinged (compliment). Shoulder still cooperating after that flare-up last month?
Locked it in early — PT perks. Karen already warned me if I end up my own patient again she's not sympathetic 😂 Come try the 5:15, Coach Mills runs a tight ship.
Hit a 275 deadlift PR at Buckhead this morning. 5:15 class, half asleep, nobody saw it coming — including me 😂
No way. What's your bodyweight right now?
192. Creatine's dialed, sleep's been locked in bc Ethan's travel baseball has me in bed by 9 lol. Accidental peak performance.
So Ethan's your secret weapon. You putting that PR on the board at the clinic or keeping it humble?
Brian you were walking kinda stiff when you came in this morning lol — did Buckhead wreck you at 5am again?
Not wrecked. That's a PR walk. Hit 225 on the clean. Legs are smoked but the data doesn't lie 💪
You're a literal PT and you show up to treat patients like that 😂 Ethan watching you limp around must be hilarious
Ethan thinks it's cool. Karen does not. I'm fine by noon — see you at the 8 o'clock eval.
Hey Brian, need to get into the clinic by 7am tomorrow to finish the rubber flooring in the gym bay. Anyone gonna be there to let me in?
I'm at CrossFit Buckhead til 6:30. Can be at Peak Performance by 6:50. That work?
Perfect. 3-man crew, we'll be done before your first patient rolls in. Maybe 9am latest.
Works. Front desk opens at 8 — check in with Megan then. Just don't stack anything against the treatment table wall, I've got equipment staged there.

Ryan — finally ready to pull the trigger on a BFR system for the clinic. Post-op load progression has been too conservative and I want to fix that. Can you get a Delfi demo unit out to Buckhead by Thursday?
Absolutely. Want me to bring the full cuff sizing kit too? Adds about 45 min but you'll get a real feel for the protocol.
Yeah bring everything. Ethan's got a baseball game Thursday evening so I need to be wheels-up by 4 — 10 AM start good?
10 AM is perfect. I'll shoot you the Q3 pricing sheet tonight, there's a promo running so your timing is solid.
Hey Brian — got a 14yo soccer player, left knee sprain, 3 weeks out. Parents want conservative mgmt before going ortho. Any openings this week at Peak Performance?
Thu afternoon works. Have mom call and send whatever you've got — exam notes, any imaging. Knee sprains at that age I want to see fast.
No imaging yet, just my clinical exam. She's trying to make club tryouts in August and the family is stressing. They'll call tomorrow morning.
August is the goal then. Tell her we'll build backward from tryout day. I'll take good care of her, Keisha.
Hit a 315 back squat PR at CrossFit Buckhead this morning. Knee tracking was textbook — zero valgus collapse. Come in 30 min early today, gonna use my own movement as a live teaching case.
Congrats that's massive!! 315 is no joke 🎉 I'll be there at 7:30 — should I pull up the squat assessment protocol beforehand?
Yes. And review knee-over-toe mechanics. Real talk: when patients see their PT squatting 315 pain-free, buy-in doubles overnight. Credibility is half the treatment.
Ha, noted — 'bring Brian's squat video to every eval.' Honestly the best teaching tool we've had all rotation 😂 See you at 7:30.
Dr. Hall heads up — printer's jammed and the eval forms aren't printing for tomorrow's 8am block. Should I just use the tablet intake?
Tablet's fine. Make sure the shoulder screening addendum is loaded — we added it last week. Don't skip it.
Got it. Also — that squat assessment demo you ran this morning was 🔥 really clicked for me finally.
Good. Comes from reps. Did 5:15 at Buckhead this morning, got eyes on my own mechanics. Hard to coach what you haven't felt.
Ethan showed up at 5:15 this morning — crushed the WOD. You put him up to that?
Ha. He asked me last week. Told him it's no joke. Proud he actually walked in.
Scaled the thrusters but kept up on the row. Natural mover. You bringing him regular?
We'll see. Karen's not thrilled about 4:45 alarms for a 15-year-old. I'm working on it.
Hey Dr. Hall — shoulder felt really solid on those landmine presses yesterday. Think I'm close to trying overhead again at the box?
Good sign. Don't jump yet though. Two more weeks on that banded external rotation protocol, then we retest overhead capacity in clinic. Don't PR your way back into a flare-up.
Haha fair point. My coach keeps programming snatches and I keep scaling. Starting to feel like the odd one out 😅
Scaling IS the program right now. Tell your coach Brian Hall said so. Foundation first — the snatches aren't going anywhere.
Hit a 315 back squat PR at Buckhead this morning but left knee tracked medial on the catch. No pain, just not clean. You seeing that pattern with any of your CrossFit athletes lately?
Yeah few guys lately — usually hip external rotator weakness driving it. How's your adductor been since that strain in March? Could be compensating.
Thought it was fully back but honestly haven't tested it heavy since. Added it to my own PT list, which is embarrassing to say out loud.
Ha. Cobbler's kids. Come by Thursday 7am before your first patient, I'll run you through a quick screen. Takes 20 min.
Brian Ellis my hammies are cooked after this morning's 5:15. Snatch pulls then 400m repeats — my posterior chain is staging a revolt. You do anything athletic or just drill teeth all day 😄
Ha. I walked to my car. That count? What's your recovery plan?
Ice bath, 20 min soft tissue work tonight. Ethan's at practice till 7 so I actually have a window.
Smart. You always say sleep is the real PR. Get some tonight man.
Brian — Q2 estimated payment due July 15. Also want to loop back on the CrossFit Buckhead membership deduction — stronger case this year given your sports PT caseload. Worth revisiting.
Good call. 5x a week at Buckhead, half my caseload is return-to-sport athletes. Hard to argue it's not directly tied to the work. Let's run it.
We'll document it under professional training/continuing ed. Just send over the annual membership cost and I'll build the supporting case. Should hold up.
Sent. Also eyeing two new e-stim units for the clinic — around $4,200 total. Full Section 179 this year or depreciate?
heard you PR'd the clean & jerk at buckhead this morning — ethan filming or did you actually focus for once 😂
225. no film. ethan had lacrosse anyway. just me and the bar at 5:15. felt good.
ok that's legit. you gonna be able to treat patients today or should i reschedule your 8am 😅
already had two athletes in before 9. legs are cooked but the hands still work fine. we're good.
